title: gleichenia circinnata
intro: Gleichenia circinnata, also known as the Australian tree fern or Australian crow fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Gleicheniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gleichenia circinnata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
